banks_intro_1: Mabanki alamulira ndalama kwa zaka mazana, akugwira ntchito ngati anthu apakati a machitidwe a ndalama ndi alonda a dongosolo la ndalama.
banks_intro_2: Bitcoin ndi dongosolo la ndalama zadigitala lopanda anthu apakati lomwe limagwira ntchito popanda mabanki kapena olamulira alikulu.
banks_intro_3: Koma kodi netiweki ya Bitcoin imasiyana bwanji ndi dongosolo la mabanki achikhalidwe? Tiyeni tifufuze kusiyana kwakukulu pakati pa njira ziwiri zosiyana izi za ndalama.
banks_point_6: Amalola kugwiritsa ntchito ndalama zopitirira ndi malipiro
point_1_summary_1: Bitcoin ilibe chilolezo, kutanthauza kuti aliyense wokhala ndi intaneti amatha kuigwiritsa ntchito popanda kupempha chilolezo kwa olamulira aliyense.
point_1_summary_3: - palibe amene angakuletseni kupeza. Mabanki, komabe, amatha kukana kutsegulira akaunti, kuumitsa akaunti zomwe zilipo, kapena kukana ntchito.
point_2_summary_1: Netiweki ya Bitcoin imagwira ntchito maola 24 patsiku, masiku 7 pasabata, masiku 365 pachaka popanda kukonzakonza kapena masiku aholide. Mabanki ali ndi maola ocheperako, amatseka masiku omaliza sabata ndi masiku aholide.
point_3_summary_1: Machitidwe onse a Bitcoin amalembedwa pa blockchain yomwe aliyense amatha kutsimikizira.
point_3_summary_2: Mabanki amagwira ntchito ndi makalata amkati ndi njira zobisika zomwe makasitomala sangatsimikizire.
point_4_summary_1: Ndi Bitcoin, mutha kusunga makiyi anu ndi kukhala ndi ulamuliro wathunthu wa ndalama zanu.
point_4_summary_3: kuti mumvetsetse kusunga wekha. Mabanki amasunga ndalama zanu mu akaunti zawo ndipo amatha kuumitsa, kuchepetsa, kapena kuletsa mwayi wanu wa ndalama nthawi iliyonse.
point_5_summary_1: Malipiro a Bitcoin ndi oonekeratu, odalirika, ndi ochepa kwambiri. Mabanki nthawi zambiri ali ndi malipiro obisika, malipiro a mwezi, malipiro a overdraft, malipiro otumiza ndalama, malipiro a ATM, ndi zilango zina.
point_6_summary_1: Bitcoin imakuletsani kugwiritsa ntchito ndalama zomwe mulibe - mungagwiritse ntchito Bitcoin yomwe muli nayo yokha. Mabanki amalola overdraft (kugwiritsa ntchito ndalama zopitirira zomwe muli nazo) ndipo amalandira malipiro aakulu.
point_7_summary_1: Machitidwe a Bitcoin sakutha kulethedwa - akafalsidwa ku netiweki, sangathe kuimitsidwa kapena kubwezeretsedwa ndi olamulira aliyense. Mabanki amatha kuletsa, kuumitsa, kubwezeretsa, kapena kuchepetsa machitidwe.
